action.reasoning: Observation: I've been working on fixing the CLIP model architecture issues, and in the latest iteration (13), I finally got a working model that trains without errors. The validation accuracy is still quite low (6.62%), but at least the model is training properly now. The key fix was using the full CLIP model and extracting the vision_model component properly. Now I need to submit an evaluation to get a baseline score and measure iteration time. With only 2.0 hours and 17 iterations left, I need to act quickly.
